title: Custom Computer Programming Services

narrative.executive_view: This packet remains confined to customer-specific application-development firms within NAICS 541511. The frozen archetype selection has overlapping count ranges with packaged-software integration, so it cannot support an industry-wide claim or readiness beyond UNPROVEN.
narrative.revenue_and_pass_through: No target-firm accrual revenue, contract, invoice, general-ledger, or subcontractor evidence was supplied. Accordingly, recognized revenue and every potential pass-through category remain missing; gross billed revenue is not substituted for controllable value-added revenue.
narrative.technical_value: The frozen value basis supplies only a source-free taxonomy and cash-cost weights. It does not measure a target's employee or contractor cost, task removability, or a technical intervention's realized cash effect, so those selections remain explicit assumptions rather than empirical findings.
narrative.implementation: No target-archetype workflow study, production deployment record, security-control evidence, retraining plan, or realized implementation-cost evidence was available. Realization and investment schedules are therefore missing rather than inferred from general AI capability claims.
narrative.commercial_capture: No customer contracts, pricing schedules, renewal data, or rebid evidence was available for the selected archetype. Commercial retention is missing and is kept distinct from accounting pass-through and implementation investment.
narrative.buyability: No lower-middle-market ownership, broker-process, bidder-log, transaction, or buyer-capacity evidence was supplied for the frozen reference buyer. Sale availability, conditional access/win, deal execution, and integration capacity are separately marked missing.
narrative.entry_and_exit: No selected-archetype transaction comparables, quality-of-earnings material, or normalized year-five state evidence was supplied. Entry price and downside multiple resilience are therefore not estimated.
narrative.operator_survival: No exhaustive, target-level fixed-base service basket reconciled to controllable value-added revenue was available. Constant-price operator-controlled demand through year five is missing rather than proxied from a broader industry trend.
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: The main uncertainty is not statistical precision: essential target-specific accounting, operating, commercial, transaction, and survival evidence is absent. The selected archetype also has frozen selection uncertainty, requiring an outcome-neutral, evidence-first packet.

scenario_narratives.low: No coherent downside scenario is authorable because the revenue denominator, cash-cost basis, realization, commercial retention, buyer evidence, valuation state, and fixed-base survival basket are unresolved.
scenario_narratives.base: The base case is intentionally unscored: the frozen assumption-only value taxonomy is preserved, while all target-specific empirical primitives without evidence remain missing.
scenario_narratives.high: No upside scenario is authorable from the available public classification and Census-access sources; they define the market boundary but do not establish a target's operating or transaction outcomes.

sources.title: U.S. Census Bureau 2022 NAICS definition for 541511
sources.what_it_supports: The target boundary: establishments primarily engaged in writing, modifying, testing, and supporting software for a particular customer.

sources.title: U.S. Census Bureau 2022 Economic Census data access
sources.what_it_supports: The official Census dissemination route for the 2022 Economic Census product statistics used by the frozen archetype enumeration.

n_band.rationale: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $292,242 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541511); class <5: 45,975 firms, avg revenue/firm $413,913 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $64,777 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 6,238 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,817,988 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $284,515 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 4,153 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,749,458 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $586,790 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 4,523 firms, avg revenue/firm $11,255,622 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,761,505 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 1,244 firms, avg revenue/firm $52,288,390 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $8,183,133 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 640 firms, avg revenue/firm $224,003,744 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $35,056,586 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 5,767
caveats: Normalized dataset value lacks MED/HIGH support and is not promoted to DIRECT.

inclusion_criteria: More of the firm's service revenue is attributable to designing and developing bespoke software applications for particular customers than to any other enumerated archetype.
The firm owns delivery of application code or a defined development workstream, whether contracted as a project, dedicated team, or time-and-materials engagement.
The firm is estimated to fall in the $1 million to $10 million EBITDA target band represented by the pinned dataset.
exclusion_criteria: Packaged-software customization or integration is the firm's largest service-revenue category.
Website or database specialty work is the firm's largest service-revenue category.
Temporary staffing, IT technical consulting, or software support is the firm's largest service-revenue category.
The establishment is primarily a software publisher, hosting provider, or computer-systems designer excluded from NAICS 541511 by the Census definition.
target_archetype.selection_basis: Stable archetype IDs were fixed before economic research. The pinned dataset estimates 5,767 target-band firms. For each Census product line, establishment prevalence was multiplied by that line's share of revenue at reporting establishments to form a primary-equivalent firm share, converting overlapping service-line presence into a principal-activity proxy. The base counts are 2,439 custom-application firms, 1,759 packaged-integration firms, 717 web/database specialists, and 470 capacity/consulting/support-led firms, plus a 382-firm residual. Custom application development wins the largest-base rule. Its coverage is 42.297% at base and approximately 32.9%-52.0% using its count range over the 5,767 denominator. Selection uncertainty is true because the selected range overlaps the packaged-integration range; this record remains solely about the selected archetype.

recognized_revenue.rationale: No target-firm trailing-twelve-month accrual recognized-revenue evidence was supplied.
caveats: Gross billed revenue is not a substitute.

pass_through_reconciliation.rationale: No target-level revenue and pass-through reconciliation was supplied.
caveats: An empty authored pass-through list does not establish that the target has no pass-through.

employee_cash_cost.rationale: Frozen assumption-mode taxonomy requires a bounded employee cash-cost component but provides no target measurement.
caveats: Index units are not revenue or dollars and must not be treated as observed target cost.
employee_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Source-free indexed cash-cost pool; not a target-firm dollar measurement.

controllable_contractor_cash_cost.rationale: Frozen assumption-mode taxonomy requires a bounded controllable-contractor component but provides no target measurement.
caveats: Documented third-party pass-through, if any, cannot enter this component.
controllable_contractor_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Source-free indexed cash-cost pool excluding documented pass-through; not a target-firm dollar measurement.

caveats: No target workflow or removable-cash evidence was supplied.

target_archetype_coverage.rationale: Frozen selected-archetype count divided by the pinned 5,767 target-band denominator.
caveats: The frozen selection has overlapping alternative ranges and is not a direct target-band firm census.

five_year_sale_availability.rationale: No selected-archetype ownership and sale-process evidence.

buyer_access_win_share.rationale: No conditional sourcing, diligence, and win evidence for the frozen buyer.

buy_mult.rationale: No selected-archetype paid entry EV to normalized EBITDA evidence.

normalized_y5_operating_state.rationale: No evidence supports an entry-equivalent normalized year-five operating state.

downside_exit_mult.rationale: Downside multiple state or allowed-channel evidence is unsupported.

cva_reconciliation.controllable_value_added_boundary: R_cva equals recognized revenue less only documented consideration contractually or economically owed to outside providers and not controlled as value added by the operator. No undocumented amount may be deducted, gross billed revenue is not a substitute, and a deducted cost may not also enter the V numerator.

numerator_costs.accounting_basis: Source-free indexed cash-cost pool; not a target-firm dollar measurement.
Source-free indexed cash-cost pool excluding documented pass-through; not a target-firm dollar measurement.

pass_through_reconciliation.rationale: No target-level revenue and pass-through reconciliation was supplied.
caveats: An empty authored pass-through list does not establish that the target has no pass-through.

cross_checks.target_identity_preserved: The packet is limited to the frozen custom-application-development archetype within 541511.
cross_checks.pass_through_removed_once: No pass-through item is authored; no undocumented amount is deducted from R_cva or included in G.
cross_checks.removability_only_in_v: Role removable fractions are isolated in the frozen V taxonomy and are not used as realization or pricing evidence.
cross_checks.investment_only_in_i: Implementation investment is missing and is not placed in commercial retention or survival.
cross_checks.commercial_only_in_c: Commercial retention is missing and is not represented through accounting pass-through or valuation.
cross_checks.buyer_access_separate_from_price: Access/win and paid entry multiple are separately missing; no price concession is assumed in access.
cross_checks.p_uses_frozen_y5_state: The required normalized y5 state is missing, and the downside anchor is bound to its null digest rather than an alternate state.
cross_checks.p_excludes_c_and_survival: The P exclusion map explicitly excludes commercial retention and survival channels.
cross_checks.survival_is_constant_price_value_added: The missing basket retains the required fixed-base constant-price CVA assertions and does not substitute a demand or price proxy.

top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Without a supported R_cva denominator, V and the survival basket cannot be established.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Target-specific cost, removability, realization, investment, and retention
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: No operating-value or h conclusion can be made.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Sale process, buyer capacity, transaction multiples, and year-five service basket
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: B, P, and operator-survival conclusions remain unresolved.

reviewer_note: Primitive research packet only. It contains no score, gate, action, verdict, or finalization.
